Package org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar

Serialized Fields

org.vorpal.blade.framework.proxy.ProxyListener proxyListener

Class org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.ProxyRegistrar extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

serialVersionUID: 1L

Serialized Fields

contactsMap

java.util.HashMap<K,V> contactsMap

maxExpires

int maxExpires

allow

java.util.List<E> allow

Class org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.ProxyRegistrarServlet extends org.vorpal.blade.framework.proxy.ProxyServlet implements Serializable

serialVersionUID: 1L

Class org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.ProxyRegistrarSettings extends org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.Configuration implements Serializable

serialVersionUID: 1L

Serialized Fields

defaultAllow

java.util.List<E> defaultAllow
If no 'Allow' header is defined in the REGISTER method, use this value for 'Allow' for the 200 OK. Otherwise, echo back the 'Allow' header values.

proxyOnUnregistered

java.lang.Boolean proxyOnUnregistered
Proxy the request to the 'To' header instead of issuing a 404 Not Found error.

addToPath

java.lang.Boolean addToPath
Specifies whether branches initiated in this proxy operation should include a Path header for the REGISTER request for this servlet container or not.

flow

javax.servlet.sip.Flow flow
Indicate that the specified flow be used while sending messages on this Proxy.

noCancel

java.lang.Boolean noCancel
Specifies whether the proxy should, or should not cancel outstanding branches upon receiving the first 2xx INVITE response as defined in RFC 3841.

outboundInterfaceAddress

java.net.InetAddress outboundInterfaceAddress
In multi-homed environment this method can be used to select the outbound interface to use when sending requests for proxy branches.

outboundInterfaceSocketAddress

java.net.InetSocketAddress outboundInterfaceSocketAddress
In multi-homed environment this method can be used to select the outbound interface and port number to use for proxy branches.

parallel

java.lang.Boolean parallel
Specifies whether to proxy in parallel or sequentially.

proxyTimeout

java.lang.Integer proxyTimeout
Sets the overall proxy timeout in seconds.

recordRoute

java.lang.Boolean recordRoute
Specifies whether branches initiated in this proxy operation should include a Record-Route header for this servlet engine or not. This shall affect all the branches created after its invocation. Record-routing is used to specify that this servlet engine must stay on the signaling path of subsequent requests.

recurse

java.lang.Boolean recurse
Specifies whether the servlet engine will automatically recurse or not. If recursion is enabled the servlet engine will automatically attempt to proxy to contact addresses received in redirect (3xx) responses. If recursion is disabled and no better response is received, a redirect response will be passed to the application and will be passed upstream towards the client.

supervised

java.lang.Boolean supervised
Specifies whether the controlling servlet is to be invoked for incoming responses relating to this proxying.

Class org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.ProxyRegistrarSettingsDefault extends ProxyRegistrarSettings implements Serializable

serialVersionUID: 1L

Class org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.RegisterCallflow extends org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow implements Serializable

serialVersionUID: 1L

settings
